calendar.matters:
Mtn For Peremptory Writ Of Mandate
Off Calendar Oct-23-2013 Denied
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER COMMUNITY INITIATIVES' MOTION FOR PEREMPTORY WRIT OF MANDATE

Appearances: Andrew E. Monach (415.268.7588) and Theresa Cho (415.268.6982) of Morrison Foerster appearing for petitioner and moving party; Hadara Stanton of the Office of the Attorney General (415.703.5561) for respondents and opposing parties.

Argued and the Court takes the matter under submission. Counsel are to submit proposed forms of order in electronic form for the Court's consideration. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported

Mtn For Peremptory Writ Of Mandate
Off Calendar Sep-10-2013 Continued To Oct-04-13 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 504
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PETITIONER COMMUNITY INITIATIVES' Motion For Peremptory Writ Of Mandate - Per order of the Presiding Judge, the motion is transferred to be heard by Judge Busch in Department 504. Please call his clerk at (415) 551-3772 to schedule a new hearing date. The parties are to meet and confer and contact the clerk to set the new hearing date. The court will not provide a court reporter for this hearing. If any party wishes a reporter, the parties must meet and confer and agree on a single reporter. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)

Mtn For Peremptory Writ Of Mandate
Off Calendar Aug-13-2013 Continued To Sep-10-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. rULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling with modification. PETITIONER COMMUNITY INITIATIVES' Motion For Peremptory Writ Of Mandate is Continued on the Court's own motion to September 10, 2013. Judge: Richard A. Kramer, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Tony Vaughn CSR6185.
